base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of palette_reference_weapons — a ui from 1986 legend of zelda. 'PALETTES FOR WOODEN SWORD, SHIELD, BOOMERANG, BOW, ARROW, RAFT, AND LADDER' reference chart showing color variants used across weapons/items. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
